title: Brazilian-Style Black Bean Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful vegan fritter inspired by Brazilian cuisine. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, mash black beans using a fork or a potato masher.
Add cornmeal, spicy corn, and onion to the bowl and stir to combine.
Heat 1/4 cup of fry oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the black bean mixture and shape into patties.
Fry the patties for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
